original_image_tags: A scanned, aged paper document with a blue stamp in the lower right corner that appears to read "FBI", with faded text and various handwritten annotations.

elements.description: US Government Office Memorandum dated July 10, 1947, regarding 'FLYING SAUCERS (DISCS)'. The page contains typed text, handwritten signatures and annotations, and a redacted section at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the document is a typed memorandum with handwritten annotations and a stamp, and neither makes specific verbatim claims about visual image content that the other contradicts.
